name: Switzerland
avoid: Budget carefully — most expensive country in Europe

cities.name: Zurich
cities.notes: Old Town Lindenhugel, Lake Zurich promenade and world-class museums

cities.name: Geneva
cities.notes: Jet d'Eau fountain, UN Palais des Nations and Vieille-Ville old town

cities.name: Interlaken
cities.notes: Paragliding, skydiving, Jungfrau railway and two alpine lake views

cities.name: Lucerne
cities.notes: Kapellbrucke wooden bridge, Lion Monument and Mt Pilatus cog railway

cities.name: Zermatt
cities.notes: Car-free village at the foot of the iconic Matterhorn peak

cities.name: Bern
cities.notes: Bear Park, rose garden, medieval arcaded Lauben streets and clock tower
